content.full_text:
TO: [ ] JEANNE   [X] JAY   (X) DAN
[X] LYNN   [X] BARBARA   (X) JOHN K
[X] ROGER   [X] CARLA   (X) MARY ANN
[ ] HELEN   [X] OTHER PATSY

FROM: PRITCHARD
DATE: 6/7/85

[X] TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW
[ ] CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
(IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

FILE LOCATION: 82016

INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE: YES [ ] NO [X]

CALLER Bill Wewar, Attorney for
REPRESENTING California Tax Reduction Movement
PHONE NUMBER: (301) 986-9474

The CTRM is forming a committee to support Sebastiani's
QUESTION: reapportionment initiative. Assemblyman Sebastiani will not
be involved in the committee's day-to-day decisions about fundraising or making expenditures, but he will approve and sign all of the committee's campaign literature. In addition, the committee will participate in the signature-gathering process.

ANSWER:
YES. Assemblyman Sebastiani will have a "significant influence on the actions or decisions of the committee" under Gov. Code Section 82016. Therefore, the committee's S/O must list him as a controlling candidate, and he must sign the committee's campaign disclosure statements.

(I also spoke with Dimitri Viripaeff of Pisenti & Brinker, Sebastiani's treasurer, regarding Sebastiani's involvement with the new committee.)
